sentences.target: Beim Laufen kann mein Knie weh tun.
sentences.reading: /baɪ̯m ˈlaʊ̯fən kan maɪ̯n kniː veː tuːn/

translations.de: Beim Laufen kann mein Knie weh tun.
translations.ipa: /baɪ̯m ˈlaʊ̯fən kan maɪ̯n kniː veː tuːn/
translations.en: My knee can hurt when I run.
translations.es: Me puede doler la rodilla cuando corro.
translations.fr: Mon genou peut me faire mal quand je cours.
translations.it: Mi può fare male il ginocchio quando corro.
translations.ko: 뛸 때 무릎이 아플 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我跑步时膝盖可能会疼。
translations.yue: 我跑步時個膝頭可能會痛。
translations.ru: Моё колено может болеть, когда я бегаю.
translations.pt: Meu joelho pode doer quando eu corro.
translations.he: הברך שלי יכולה לכאוב כשאני רץ.
translations.vi: Đầu gối tôi có thể đau khi tôi chạy.
translations.nl: Mijn knie kan pijn doen als ik ren.
translations.uk: Моє коліно може боліти, коли я бігаю.
translations.hi: जब मैं दौड़ता हूँ तो मेरे घुटने में दर्द हो सकता है.
translations.pl: Moje kolano może boleć, kiedy biegam.
translations.el: Το γόνατό μου μπορεί να πονάει όταν τρέχω.
translations.nb: Kneet mitt kan gjøre vondt når jeg løper.
translations.id: Lutut saya bisa sakit saat saya lari.
translations.sv: Mitt knä kan göra ont när jag springer.
translations.ro: Genunchiul meu poate să doară când alerg.
translations.cs: Mé koleno může bolet, když běžím.
translations.da: Mit knæ kan gøre ondt, når jeg løber.
translations.ja: 走ると膝が痛くなることがあります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'bei' + article 'dem'; introduces a dative prepositional phrase, here forming a temporal/attendant circumstance PP with a nominalized verb ('beim Laufen' ≈ 'while running').
Nominalized infinitive (substantiviertes Verb) governed by 'beim' in the dative; denotes the activity 'running'.
Modal auxiliary in V2 position; selects a bare infinitive at clause end ('tun') and expresses possibility.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Knie'; agrees with a neuter singular noun in nominative.
Noun, neuter; subject of the clause in nominative singular.
Predicative adjective forming a fixed separable verb construction with 'tun' meaning 'to hurt'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive selected by the modal 'kann'; together with 'weh' forms the separable verb 'weh|tun' = 'to hurt'.

sentences.target: Beim Zahnarzt kann das weh tun.

translations.de: Beim Zahnarzt kann das weh tun.
translations.en: That can hurt at the dentist.
translations.es: En el dentista eso puede doler.
translations.fr: Chez le dentiste, ça peut faire mal.
translations.ru: У стоматолога это может быть больно.
translations.he: אצל רופא השיניים זה יכול לכאוב.
translations.vi: Ở nha sĩ, cái đó có thể đau.
translations.ar: عند طبيب الأسنان قد يؤلم ذلك.
translations.nl: Bij de tandarts kan dat pijn doen.
translations.uk: У стоматолога це може бути боляче.
translations.hi: डेंटिस्ट के यहाँ यह दर्द हो सकता है.
translations.el: Στον οδοντίατρο αυτό μπορεί να πονέσει.
translations.nb: Hos tannlegen kan det gjøre vondt.
translations.id: Di dokter gigi, itu bisa sakit.
translations.sv: Hos tandläkaren kan det göra ont.
translations.ro: La dentist, asta poate să doară.
translations.da: Hos tandlægen kan det gøre ondt.
translations.ja: 歯医者では痛むことがあります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction 'bei dem'; introduces a dative locative PP ('at the dentist's').
Noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of 'beim', forming a locative adjunct.
Modal auxiliary in V2; selects the bare infinitive 'tun' at clause end and expresses possibility.
Demonstrative/neutral pronoun functioning as the subject ('that/it').
Predicative adjective forming a fixed separable verb construction with 'tun' meaning 'to hurt'.
Bare infinitive selected by the modal 'kann'; with 'weh' forms 'weh|tun' = 'to hurt'.

translations.nb: Det kommer til å gjøre vondt.
translations.da: Det kommer til at gøre ondt.

tokens.explanation: Personal/expletive pronoun functioning as subject.
Auxiliary 'werden' forming the future tense with a bare infinitive ('tun') at clause end.
Predicative adjective in the fixed separable verb with 'tun' meaning 'to hurt'.
Bare infinitive as the main lexical verb; together with 'weh' forms 'weh|tun' = 'to hurt'.

translations.es: Eso no tiene por qué doler.
translations.fr: Ça n’est pas obligé de faire mal.
translations.it: Non deve per forza far male.
translations.vi: Cái đó không nhất thiết phải đau.
translations.nl: Dat hoeft niet pijn te doen.
translations.hi: यह दर्द होना जरूरी नहीं है.
translations.nb: Det trenger ikke å gjøre vondt.
translations.da: Det behøver ikke at gøre ondt.
translations.ja: 痛くなる必要はありません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative/neutral pronoun functioning as the subject ('that/it').
Modal auxiliary expressing necessity/obligation; selects a bare infinitive ('tun') at clause end.
Negation particle; negates the predicate phrase ('weh tun').
Predicative adjective forming the separable verb with 'tun' meaning 'to hurt'.
Bare infinitive; with 'weh' forms 'weh|tun' = 'to hurt'.
